TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Igor_Dodon, title = Igor_Dodon, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Igor_Dodon} }

S.FORM: = Igor Dodon = Mntucing hngkawas 1975 idas 2 jiyax 18 ka Igor Dodon ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Moldova ta sayang o kiya ka Igor Dodon, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 12 jiyax 23 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Igor Dodon Igor Dodon (Kari Moldova: Igor Dodon; kngkawas 1975 idas 2 diyax 18-), brah Soto Moldova mi Moldova Konghkwo Syakay Cuyice Tang Cusi, kngkawas 2006 idas 9 dhuq kngkawas 2009 idas 9 mnngalan Keyjaybu Bucyo, kngkawas 2008 ka muda ngalan cyeynjn Huku Congri. Kngkawas 2016 mi kngkawas 2020 Soto knbeyhing seyngkyo to bay mniq tumn2 meytaq hyo tuhuy Maya Santu pnsung, tumn1 ka mbiyax mangal Soto, tumn2 daw wada ini baka. Igor Dodon u kngkawas 1975 idas 2 diyax 18 mntuting Moldova Klerahy Keyng na Sadowa Cwen. Mnhdu muyas Pnhiyu Qnlhangan Moldova Pyasan Tubeyhing Qqpahan Pnwalang Qqpahan Pnwalang Keyjay Sweysi, kngkawas 1988 daw wada mangal Moldova Keyjay Keyngkyo Sweyweyn Hakasey Sweywey (PhD.). Babaw niya daw mniq sapah pyasan tmsa laqi muyas. Kngkawas 2005 idas 5, Igor Dodon u wada psdhuwan phiyu Mawyi mi Keyjay Huku Bucyo, kngkawas 2006 idas 9 ka ngalan Bucyo, kngkawas ka ngalan cyeynjn Huku Congri, dhuq kngkawas 2009 idas 9 Zinaida Greceani seyhu daw wada malax qpahun. Kngkawas 2011, Igor Dodon u muda tumal seyngkyo Chisinau Sucang, binaw 49.4% ka hyo niya mi wada ini baka Dolin Kirtoak. Kngkawas 2011 idas 11 cida, Igor Dodon u malax Moldova Konghkwo Kyosangto Sediq Tang, tumal Moldova Konghkwo Syakay Cuyice Tang, kiya mi mniq idas 12 diyax 18 wada mangal Tang Cusi. Kngkawas 2016 idas 10, Igor Dodon u tumal Moldova Soto seyngkyo, niyi ka qnlhangan dha keyngpo hoying mniq idas 3 diyax 4 wada tbrinah knkana sediq qnlhangan ka muda seyngkyo Soto. Seyngkyo brah cida mintyaw ka pkla, Igor Dodon u hmrinas 40% ssediq ka dmkuh mi mniq brah. Idas 10 diyax 31, Igor Dodon tuhuy Moldova Singtong Mi Dankeycu Tang hosweynjn Maya Santu u Igor Dodon ka 48.91% hyo mi Maya Santu ka 37.79% hyo, alaw ka ini khrinas 50%, mniq brah ka 2 Igor Dodon mi Maya Santu mniq idas 11 diyax 13 muda tumn2 pnsung seyngkyo, kiya mi wada mbiyax mangal Soto ka Igor Dodon. Babaw 4 kngkawas daw, Igor Dodon mn1 tumal Soto seyngkyo, tumn2 meytaq hyo tuhuy Maya Santu muda pnsung, kiya mi wada ini baka ka Igor Dodon, kiya ka uka brahan muda lmutuc qpahun Soto. Igor Dodon u wada mangal qridin da, niqan 3 laqi niya. Waycyaw cngce Pnluban quri Omong Qnita Igor Dodon pa Omong pnquri Russia cyuns muda pddayak Crimea Pantaw mi Tunarac Ukraine, snquri Russia muda pchuwan keyjay uqnuqu balay kiya, pusu na balay u pquri seyhu Russia. Kiya mi Igor Dodon cida u muda pkla kari dndulan niya ka seyhu Moldova pa qulung balay uxay mpsruwa pnlawa Romania quri Moldova ptumal Omong mi mpprngaw kari, qmita uuda Romania u alaw iyux umluk Moldova na Congri Qnlhangan ka niqan biyax qmlahang uuda nanaq, kiya ka smatang nxal daw yuxan dha sbrnahun psupu Romania dungan. Pnluban quri dha Russia Quri so qnita seyji Igor Dodon pa ida nanaq sndalih Russia, wada mangal Soto daw kiya ka kasi usa Russia Moscow tuhuy Soto Russia Putin mtqita dqras. Igor Dodon u mnpusa kari meysa qnlangan syakay Crimea ka ndxral Russia uri ka pusu kari niya.
S.PHON: = igoɾ dodon = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka igoɾ dodon ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan moldo*a ta sajaŋ o kija ka igoɾ dodon, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. igoɾ dodon igoɾ dodon (kaɾi moldo*a: igoɾ dodon; kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **-), bɾaħ soto moldo*a mi moldo*a koŋħkwo sjakaj ʦujiʦə taŋ ʦusi, kŋkawas **** idas * dħuq kŋkawas **** idas * mnŋalan kəɟajbu buʦjo, kŋkawas **** ka muda ŋalan ʦjənɟn ħuku ʦoŋɾi. kŋkawas **** mi kŋkawas **** soto knbəħiŋ səŋkjo to baj mniq tumn* mətaq ħjo tuħuj maja santu pnsuŋ, tumn* ka mbijax maŋal soto, tumn* daw wada ini baka. igoɾ dodon u kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŋ moldo*a kləɾaħj kəŋ na sadowa ʦwən. mnħdu mujas pnħiju qnlħaŋan moldo*a pjasan tubəħiŋ qqpaħan pnwalaŋ qqpaħan pnwalaŋ kəɟaj swəsi, kŋkawas **** daw wada maŋal moldo*a kəɟaj kəŋkjo swəwən ħakasə swəwə (pħd.). babaw nija daw mniq sapaħ pjasan tmsa laqi mujas. kŋkawas **** idas *, igoɾ dodon u wada psdħuwan pħiju mawji mi kəɟaj ħuku buʦjo, kŋkawas **** idas * ka ŋalan buʦjo, kŋkawas ka ŋalan ʦjənɟn ħuku ʦoŋɾi, dħuq kŋkawas **** idas * *inaida gɾəʦəani səħu daw wada malax qpaħun. kŋkawas ****, igoɾ dodon u muda tumal səŋkjo ʦħisinau suʦaŋ, binaw **.*% ka ħjo nija mi wada ini baka dolin kiɾtoak. kŋkawas **** idas ** ʦida, igoɾ dodon u malax moldo*a koŋħkwo kjosaŋto sədiq taŋ, tumal moldo*a koŋħkwo sjakaj ʦujiʦə taŋ, kija mi mniq idas ** dijax ** wada maŋal taŋ ʦusi. kŋkawas **** idas **, igoɾ dodon u tumal moldo*a soto səŋkjo, niji ka qnlħaŋan dħa kəŋpo ħojiŋ mniq idas * dijax * wada tbɾinaħ knkana sədiq qnlħaŋan ka muda səŋkjo soto. səŋkjo bɾaħ ʦida mintjaw ka pkla, igoɾ dodon u ħmɾinas **% ssədiq ka dmkuħ mi mniq bɾaħ. idas ** dijax **, igoɾ dodon tuħuj moldo*a siŋtoŋ mi dankəʦu taŋ ħoswənɟn maja santu u igoɾ dodon ka **.**% ħjo mi maja santu ka **.**% ħjo, alaw ka ini kħɾinas **%, mniq bɾaħ ka * igoɾ dodon mi maja santu mniq idas ** dijax ** muda tumn* pnsuŋ səŋkjo, kija mi wada mbijax maŋal soto ka igoɾ dodon. babaw * kŋkawas daw, igoɾ dodon mn* tumal soto səŋkjo, tumn* mətaq ħjo tuħuj maja santu muda pnsuŋ, kija mi wada ini baka ka igoɾ dodon, kija ka uka bɾaħan muda lmutuʦ qpaħun soto. igoɾ dodon u wada maŋal qɾidin da, niqan * laqi nija. wajʦjaw ʦŋʦə pnluban quɾi omoŋ qnita igoɾ dodon pa omoŋ pnquɾi ɾussia ʦjuns muda pddajak ʦɾiməa pantaw mi tunaɾaʦ ukɾainə, snquɾi ɾussia muda pʦħuwan kəɟaj uqnuqu balaj kija, pusu na balaj u pquɾi səħu ɾussia. kija mi igoɾ dodon ʦida u muda pkla kaɾi dndulan nija ka səħu moldo*a pa quluŋ balaj uxaj mpsɾuwa pnlawa ɾomania quɾi moldo*a ptumal omoŋ mi mppɾŋaw kaɾi, qmita uuda ɾomania u alaw ijux umluk moldo*a na ʦoŋɾi qnlħaŋan ka niqan bijax qmlaħaŋ uuda nanaq, kija ka smataŋ nxal daw juxan dħa sbɾnaħun psupu ɾomania duŋan. pnluban quɾi dħa ɾussia quɾi so qnita səɟi igoɾ dodon pa ida nanaq sndaliħ ɾussia, wada maŋal soto daw kija ka kasi usa ɾussia mosʦow tuħuj soto ɾussia putin mtqita dqɾas. igoɾ dodon u mnpusa kaɾi məsa qnlaŋan sjakaj ʦɾiməa ka ndxɾal ɾussia uɾi ka pusu kaɾi nija.
S.FORM: = Igor Dodon = Mntucing hngkawas 1975 idas 2 jiyax 18 ka Igor Dodon ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Moldova ta sayang o kiya ka Igor Dodon, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 12 jiyax 23 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Igor Dodon Igor Dodon (Kari Moldova: Igor Dodon; kngkawas 1975 idas 2 diyax 18-), brah Soto Moldova mi Moldova Konghkwo Syakay Cuyice Tang Cusi, kngkawas 2006 idas 9 dhuq kngkawas 2009 idas 9 mnngalan Keyjaybu Bucyo, kngkawas 2008 ka muda ngalan cyeynjn Huku Congri. Kngkawas 2016 mi kngkawas 2020 Soto knbeyhing seyngkyo to bay mniq tumn2 meytaq hyo tuhuy Maya Santu pnsung, tumn1 ka mbiyax mangal Soto, tumn2 daw wada ini baka. Igor Dodon u kngkawas 1975 idas 2 diyax 18 mntuting Moldova Klerahy Keyng na Sadowa Cwen. Mnhdu muyas Pnhiyu Qnlhangan Moldova Pyasan Tubeyhing Qqpahan Pnwalang Qqpahan Pnwalang Keyjay Sweysi, kngkawas 1988 daw wada mangal Moldova Keyjay Keyngkyo Sweyweyn Hakasey Sweywey (PhD.). Babaw niya daw mniq sapah pyasan tmsa laqi muyas. Kngkawas 2005 idas 5, Igor Dodon u wada psdhuwan phiyu Mawyi mi Keyjay Huku Bucyo, kngkawas 2006 idas 9 ka ngalan Bucyo, kngkawas ka ngalan cyeynjn Huku Congri, dhuq kngkawas 2009 idas 9 Zinaida Greceani seyhu daw wada malax qpahun. Kngkawas 2011, Igor Dodon u muda tumal seyngkyo Chisinau Sucang, binaw 49.4% ka hyo niya mi wada ini baka Dolin Kirtoak. Kngkawas 2011 idas 11 cida, Igor Dodon u malax Moldova Konghkwo Kyosangto Sediq Tang, tumal Moldova Konghkwo Syakay Cuyice Tang, kiya mi mniq idas 12 diyax 18 wada mangal Tang Cusi. Kngkawas 2016 idas 10, Igor Dodon u tumal Moldova Soto seyngkyo, niyi ka qnlhangan dha keyngpo hoying mniq idas 3 diyax 4 wada tbrinah knkana sediq qnlhangan ka muda seyngkyo Soto. Seyngkyo brah cida mintyaw ka pkla, Igor Dodon u hmrinas 40% ssediq ka dmkuh mi mniq brah. Idas 10 diyax 31, Igor Dodon tuhuy Moldova Singtong Mi Dankeycu Tang hosweynjn Maya Santu u Igor Dodon ka 48.91% hyo mi Maya Santu ka 37.79% hyo, alaw ka ini khrinas 50%, mniq brah ka 2 Igor Dodon mi Maya Santu mniq idas 11 diyax 13 muda tumn2 pnsung seyngkyo, kiya mi wada mbiyax mangal Soto ka Igor Dodon. Babaw 4 kngkawas daw, Igor Dodon mn1 tumal Soto seyngkyo, tumn2 meytaq hyo tuhuy Maya Santu muda pnsung, kiya mi wada ini baka ka Igor Dodon, kiya ka uka brahan muda lmutuc qpahun Soto. Igor Dodon u wada mangal qridin da, niqan 3 laqi niya. Waycyaw cngce Pnluban quri Omong Qnita Igor Dodon pa Omong pnquri Russia cyuns muda pddayak Crimea Pantaw mi Tunarac Ukraine, snquri Russia muda pchuwan keyjay uqnuqu balay kiya, pusu na balay u pquri seyhu Russia. Kiya mi Igor Dodon cida u muda pkla kari dndulan niya ka seyhu Moldova pa qulung balay uxay mpsruwa pnlawa Romania quri Moldova ptumal Omong mi mpprngaw kari, qmita uuda Romania u alaw iyux umluk Moldova na Congri Qnlhangan ka niqan biyax qmlahang uuda nanaq, kiya ka smatang nxal daw yuxan dha sbrnahun psupu Romania dungan. Pnluban quri dha Russia Quri so qnita seyji Igor Dodon pa ida nanaq sndalih Russia, wada mangal Soto daw kiya ka kasi usa Russia Moscow tuhuy Soto Russia Putin mtqita dqras. Igor Dodon u mnpusa kari meysa qnlangan syakay Crimea ka ndxral Russia uri ka pusu kari niya.

klwaan. igoɾ dodon igoɾ dodon (kaɾi moldo*a: igoɾ dodon; kŋkawas **** idas * dijax **-), bɾaħ soto moldo*a mi moldo*a koŋħkwo sjakaj ʦujiʦə taŋ ʦusi, kŋkawas **** idas * dħuq kŋkawas **** idas * mnŋalan kəɟajbu buʦjo, kŋkawas **** ka muda ŋalan ʦjənɟn ħuku ʦoŋɾi. kŋkawas **** mi kŋkawas **** soto knbəħiŋ səŋkjo to baj mniq tumn* mətaq ħjo tuħuj maja santu pnsuŋ, tumn* ka mbijax maŋal soto, tumn* daw wada ini baka. igoɾ dodon u kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** mntutiŋ moldo*a kləɾaħj kəŋ na sadowa ʦwən. mnħdu mujas pnħiju qnlħaŋan moldo*a pjasan tubəħiŋ qqpaħan pnwalaŋ qqpaħan pnwalaŋ kəɟaj swəsi, kŋkawas **** daw wada maŋal moldo*a kəɟaj kəŋkjo swəwən ħakasə swəwə (pħd.). babaw nija daw mniq sapaħ pjasan tmsa laqi mujas. kŋkawas **** idas *, igoɾ dodon u wada psdħuwan pħiju mawji mi kəɟaj ħuku buʦjo, kŋkawas **** idas * ka ŋalan buʦjo, kŋkawas ka ŋalan ʦjənɟn ħuku ʦoŋɾi, dħuq kŋkawas **** idas * *inaida gɾəʦəani səħu daw wada malax qpaħun. kŋkawas ****, igoɾ dodon u muda tumal səŋkjo ʦħisinau suʦaŋ, binaw **.*% ka ħjo nija mi wada ini baka dolin kiɾtoak. kŋkawas **** idas ** ʦida, igoɾ dodon u malax moldo*a koŋħkwo kjosaŋto sədiq taŋ, tumal moldo*a koŋħkwo sjakaj ʦujiʦə taŋ, kija mi mniq idas ** dijax ** wada maŋal taŋ ʦusi. kŋkawas **** idas **, igoɾ dodon u tumal moldo*a soto səŋkjo, niji ka qnlħaŋan dħa kəŋpo ħojiŋ mniq idas * dijax * wada tbɾinaħ knkana sədiq qnlħaŋan ka muda səŋkjo soto. səŋkjo bɾaħ ʦida mintjaw ka pkla, igoɾ dodon u ħmɾinas **% ssədiq ka dmkuħ mi mniq bɾaħ. idas ** dijax **, igoɾ dodon tuħuj moldo*a siŋtoŋ mi dankəʦu taŋ ħoswənɟn maja santu u igoɾ dodon ka **.**% ħjo mi maja santu ka **.**% ħjo, alaw ka ini kħɾinas **%, mniq bɾaħ ka * igoɾ dodon mi maja santu mniq idas ** dijax ** muda tumn* pnsuŋ səŋkjo, kija mi wada mbijax maŋal soto ka igoɾ dodon. babaw * kŋkawas daw, igoɾ dodon mn* tumal soto səŋkjo, tumn* mətaq ħjo tuħuj maja santu muda pnsuŋ, kija mi wada ini baka ka igoɾ dodon, kija ka uka bɾaħan muda lmutuʦ qpaħun soto. igoɾ dodon u wada maŋal qɾidin da, niqan * laqi nija. wajʦjaw ʦŋʦə pnluban quɾi omoŋ qnita igoɾ dodon pa omoŋ pnquɾi ɾussia ʦjuns muda pddajak ʦɾiməa pantaw mi tunaɾaʦ ukɾainə, snquɾi ɾussia muda pʦħuwan kəɟaj uqnuqu balaj kija, pusu na balaj u pquɾi səħu ɾussia. kija mi igoɾ dodon ʦida u muda pkla kaɾi dndulan nija ka səħu moldo*a pa quluŋ balaj uxaj mpsɾuwa pnlawa ɾomania quɾi moldo*a ptumal omoŋ mi mppɾŋaw kaɾi, qmita uuda ɾomania u alaw ijux umluk moldo*a na ʦoŋɾi qnlħaŋan ka niqan bijax qmlaħaŋ uuda nanaq, kija ka smataŋ nxal daw juxan dħa sbɾnaħun psupu ɾomania duŋan. pnluban quɾi dħa ɾussia quɾi so qnita səɟi igoɾ dodon pa ida nanaq sndaliħ ɾussia, wada maŋal soto daw kija ka kasi usa ɾussia mosʦow tuħuj soto ɾussia putin mtqita dqɾas. igoɾ dodon u mnpusa kaɾi məsa qnlaŋan sjakaj ʦɾiməa ka ndxɾal ɾussia uɾi ka pusu kaɾi nija.
